title: Brussels Court Orders Google to Open Anonymized User Search and Click Data to Rivals - TCR 07/17/26
description:
The EU issued two binding DMA decisions requiring Google to share certain anonymized query-and-click data with rival search providers and open Android to rival AI assistants by 2027, Feinstein Institutes researchers restored movement and touch to a man paralyzed six years through a double neural bypass whose gains held for months with the implant off, and some AI-designed synthetic enzymes edited human genes more efficiently than natural CRISPR proteins in a new Science paper.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-july-17-2026/

0:00 Open and framing
0:28 EU forces Google to share search data and open Android
3:09 A neural bypass restores movement and touch
6:30 AI-designed CRISPR enzymes beat nature's
9:43 FERC and PJM make data centers pay for the grid
13:59 Ant Group scales label-free learning to a trillion parameters
17:05 Close

This episode covers the EU DMA data-sharing and Android decisions, the double neural bypass and its lasting neuroplastic rewiring, AI-designed CRISPR enzymes and minimal RNA-guided nucleases, FERC's directive to NERC to develop mandatory reliability standards for large data centers and other computational loads alongside PJM's price-cap auction, Hyundai's Ulsan strike over 25,000 Atlas humanoid robots, and Ant Group's trillion-parameter label-free reinforcement learning.

The day's signal is boundaries the field had treated as permanent floors all cracking at once. Brussels required Google to share certain anonymized query-and-click data with rival search providers and opened Android so rival assistants can compete on the quality of the answer. A double neural bypass gave Keith Thomas back arm movement and touch, and the gains persisted through a forced three-month pause, pointing to genuine neuroplastic rewiring. Some AI-designed synthetic enzymes edited human genes more efficiently than natural CRISPR proteins, alongside minimal enzymes small enough to deliver more easily. FERC directed NERC to develop mandatory reliability standards that could register data centers as accountable grid entities, while PJM stakeholders pushed those loads to fund their own generation and Virginia weighed making them cover transmission costs. Hyundai's Ulsan workers scheduled strikes to decouple pay from the hours 25,000 humanoid robots will absorb by 2028. Ant Group scaled zero-label reinforcement learning to a trillion open-weight parameters, and the model spontaneously learned to watch its own context window and ration its reasoning. TSMC also committed another $100 billion to four more Arizona fabs, raising its US buildout to $265 billion.
